constitution: v2.2 (Art. XI source-dependency, Art. XII no-grade-by-creating-rule, Art. XV transfer licences)
non_circular_note: LB conventional_value used ONLY as a grading key on benchmarks; never a channel input.

channel_definitions.chronology: script-level ordering + LA-internal per-sign date span
channel_definitions.source_dependency: provenance / independence class of each value claim (audit)

admin_calibration.benchmark: shared-AB held-out LOTO (leave-one-toponym-out), value graded by LB conventional value
admin_calibration.channel: distributional admin-role (PPMI + SVD co-occurrence, Procrustes-aligned) -- uses NO phonetic value
admin_calibration.verdict: NULL -- does not beat the shuffled null; no non-circular value power at LA scale

shape_calibration.benchmark: S&M-2017 stable-11 recovery (Fisher one-sided), value graded by Cypriot stability
shape_calibration.verdict: CIRCULAR -- shape grade = Salgarella LB-homophony judgment; separates the stable-11 perfectly but confounded (same latent LB-identity fact). Capped <=0.75.

calibration.benchmark: S&M-2017 stable-11 recovery (Fisher one-sided), value graded by Cypriot stability
calibration.verdict: CIRCULAR -- shape grade = Salgarella LB-homophony judgment; separates the stable-11 perfectly but confounded (same latent LB-identity fact). Capped <=0.75.

shape.reason: Circular: the grade IS an LB-homophony judgment (=identity). Calibrates perfectly but confounded with the value it should predict. Capped <=0.75. NOT independently calibratable.

stroke_structure.reason: Unpopulated: no LA<->LB stroke-decomposition dataset in the repo. Cannot be scored, so cannot be calibrated. (Would in principle be non-circular if a palaeographic stroke corpus were acquired.)

orientation.reason: Unpopulated: no glyph-orientation dataset. A sub-facet of shape; not independently measurable here.

chronology.reason: Script-level ordering (all LA predates all LB). Not sign-discriminative for a CORRESPONDENCE: it cannot pin which LB sign an LA sign maps to. LA-internal date span varies but carries no LB-value info.

geography.reason: LA per-sign site profiles ARE measurable and vary across signs, but LA (Crete find-sites) and LB (Knossos/mainland archives) share no site system, so no non-circular held-out benchmark aligns a geographic score to an LB correspondence. Measurable but not correspondence-calibratable.

calibration.benchmark: shared-AB held-out LOTO (leave-one-toponym-out), value graded by LB conventional value
calibration.channel: distributional admin-role (PPMI + SVD co-occurrence, Procrustes-aligned) -- uses NO phonetic value
calibration.verdict: NULL -- does not beat the shuffled null; no non-circular value power at LA scale

admin_function.reason: The ONLY channel that is BOTH non-circular (uses no LB value) AND has a non-circular held-out benchmark (shared-AB LOTO). It IS independently calibratable -- and when calibrated it is NULL (R@1=0.000, perm-p(R@5)=0.60). Independently calibratable, independently refuted.

calibration.note: same benchmark as shape (S&M stable-11); confounded
calibration.benchmark: S&M-2017 stable-11 recovery (Fisher one-sided), value graded by Cypriot stability
calibration.verdict: CIRCULAR -- shape grade = Salgarella LB-homophony judgment; separates the stable-11 perfectly but confounded (same latent LB-identity fact). Capped <=0.75.

scholarly_correspondence.reason: Scholarly Cypriot-stability status is itself an expert value judgment on the same latent identity. Grading it by LB/Cypriot value is circular. High-value but not INDEPENDENT of the value channel.

source_dependency.reason: A meta / audit channel (Art. XI), not a value predictor: it measures HOW independent each claim is, not what value a sign has. Finding: 0/59 correspondences rest on a PRIMARY value attestation (52 litindex-seed + 7 bridge, all secondary); the only primary legs are shape (Salgarella, pending-primary/absent from repo) and Cypriot (S&M) -- both circular. So even the provenance audit shows no independent primary support for any LA<->LB VALUE.

ch_stroke_structure.note: no LA<->LB stroke-decomposition dataset in repo (SigLA signs carry id/class/gorila_number only)

ch_orientation.note: no glyph-orientation / mirroring dataset in repo; not a distinct measurable channel here

ch_source_dependency.note: predictive? NO -- this is an audit instrument (Art. XI), not a value predictor

summary.verdict: EXACTLY ONE of the eight channels (admin_function, distributional) is BOTH non-circular AND independently calibratable against a non-circular held-out benchmark -- and it calibrates to NULL. shape and scholarly_correspondence calibrate but are CIRCULAR (confounded with LB identity, capped <=0.75). chronology is not sign-discriminative; stroke_structure and orientation are unpopulated; geography is measurable but has no correspondence-aligned non-circular benchmark; source_dependency is a provenance audit (0/59 correspondences have a primary VALUE source). Net: DECOMPOSITION CONFIRMS no channel yields an independently-calibratable NON-NULL, NON-CIRCULAR LA<->LB value correspondence.
